framework.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
framework.description: A standardization protocol that acts as the 'USB-C for AI' - providing structured contexts, tools, datasets, and prompts to LLMs through universal tool connections and secure communication methods.
framework.raw_quote: Consider MCP to be the AI equivalent of USB-C: one ubiquitous standard that seamlessly functions. Instead of building one-off connectors every time, MCP provides a plug-and-play, reusable framework.
